_README: RFPS.JSON - data file for the private RFP tracker
rfps    - the scraped + manual tender records
portals - the static portal directory shown at the bottom
of the page (login-walled portals included here)
last_updated - when the scraper last ran
DO YOU NEED TO EDIT THIS FILE?
Most of the time, NO. The scraper (rfp_scrape.py) updates the
rfps array automatically every day at 10:30 UTC.
You DO need to edit this file if you want to:
'lost', or 'closed' (so it stays / leaves the active view).
Find the tender by id in the rfps array, change its
'status' value. The scraper will preserve your change.
2. Add a personal note against a tender. Find by id, edit
3. Add a manual tender (e.g. one your Gemini Scout found
that the scraper missed). Add a new object to the rfps
array with source: 'Gemini Scout' (anything NOT in the
scraper's SCRAPER_SOURCES set). Preserved across scrapes.
4. Add or remove a portal in the portals array. The
'status':    'open | watching | bidding | submitted | won | lost | closed',
'url':       'direct link to the public tender notice',
'why_fits':  'auto-set by scraper showing which keyword matched',
'notes':          'Hover-tooltip text, e.g. who has the password'

portals.name: CanadaBuys
portals.notes: Federal Canada tenders. Login: ashley@edgewiseenvironmental.com (BitWarden). Scraper covers this. Search terms: 70101602, 70100000, 81171500, 77101500, DFO, marine mammal, seabird, marine renewable, PWGSC, DND. Filters: Services, Open, BC, Indigenous Lands, NB, NL, NS, NWT, NU, PEI, QC, YT.

portals.name: UK Find a Tender
portals.notes: UK above-threshold contracts (>~£139k). Scraper covers this.

portals.name: UK Contracts Finder
portals.notes: UK below-threshold contracts. Scraper covers this.

portals.name: SPREP - Tenders
portals.notes: Pacific Regional Environment Programme. Source of the Palau seabird tender. Scraper covers this.

portals.name: World Bank - Procurement Notices
portals.notes: Global multilateral procurement. Scraper covers this.

portals.name: International Maritime Organisation
portals.notes: Maritime tenders. Highly relevant for marine acoustic / underwater work. Scraper covers this.

portals.name: Caribbean Development Bank
portals.notes: General Procurement Notices. Scraper covers this.

portals.name: BC Bid
portals.notes: BC public sector procurement. Browse public, login to bid. Covers BC Hydro and many other BC entities. Scraper covers this.

portals.name: BC Hydro - Bid Opportunities
portals.notes: BC Hydro posts all opportunities on BC Bid - this is the explainer page. Already covered by BC Bid scraper.

portals.name: NL Hydro - Bids and Tenders
portals.notes: Login: kyla.graham@edgewiseenvironmental.com (BitWarden). Owner: Kyla. Scraper covers this. Login only required to bid, not to view.

portals.name: Government of Yukon - Bids
portals.notes: bidsandtenders.ca platform. Scraper covers this.

portals.name: Gov of Nova Scotia - Procurement
portals.notes: Public listings. My NS Account needed to bid. Not currently registered (per tracker). Scraper covers this.

portals.name: Government of Nunavut - RFTP
portals.notes: Arctic procurement - Edgewise differentiator. Bidder Registration needed to bid. Scraper covers this.

portals.name: BC Ferries - Procurement
portals.notes: Some opportunities on own page, some on BC Bid. Scraper covers this.

portals.name: LNG Canada - Procurement
portals.notes: Marine environmental work around the Kitimat LNG terminal. Scraper covers this.

portals.name: MERX - Government of NL
portals.notes: Listing public; bid documents may have a Pay-as-you-go cost. Not currently registered (per tracker). Scraper covers this.

portals.name: SAP Ariba
portals.notes: Login: ashley@edgewiseenvironmental.com (BitWarden). Auth-walled, scraper cannot reach.

portals.name: Sofia Offshore Wind - Supplier Portal
portals.notes: Auth-walled. Browse company info publicly; supplier portal needs login.

portals.name: ABCMI Login
portals.notes: Members-only industry association. Auth-walled.

portals.name: Energy Research & Innovation NL
portals.notes: No tender listings page - check news section manually.

portals.name: AllNewfoundland and Labrador
portals.notes: NL aggregator - manual browse only.

portals.name: ElWind Project
portals.notes: Static project page - no listings.

portals.name: Piranha Offshore Wind
portals.notes: Static project page - no listings.

portals.name: Agnico Eagle - Suppliers
portals.notes: Contact page only - manual outreach.

portals.name: COSEWIC
portals.notes: News and events only - no procurement listings.
